content: Use Redis for session caching across the API gateway
Use PostgreSQL with pgvector as primary datastore; MySQL is rejected for lack of JSON ergonomics
Use FastAPI for the public HTTP layer; Flask was rejected for async limitations
Use OAuth2 with PKCE for the mobile clients; password grant is forbidden
Use S3-compatible object storage for user uploads, served behind a CloudFront distribution
Use Stripe for payments; PayPal integration deferred to phase 2
Use GitHub Actions for CI; deploy to staging on every merge to main
Use Sentry for error tracking; Datadog handles APM and infra metrics
Users must be able to export all of their personal data as a single ZIP archive (GDPR Article 20)
Account deletion must be soft for 30 days and then hard-purged from every backup
All admin actions must produce a tamper-evident audit log entry, hashed in a chain
The mobile app must function offline for at least one hour of typical use before requiring sync
Prefer async/await over thread pools in Python; ThreadPoolExecutor is allowed only for blocking C extensions
Prefer dataclasses with type hints over dict-shaped payloads for inter-service messages
Prefer integration tests against a real database over mocking the ORM
Prefer feature flags over long-lived branches when rolling out risky changes
API rate limit is 1000 requests per minute per authenticated user
JWT access tokens have a 15-minute lifetime; refresh tokens last 30 days and rotate on use
The /v1/search endpoint requires the 'search:read' OAuth scope
Database connection pool is sized at 20 connections per app worker with a 5-second checkout timeout
Production runs Python 3.11 on Ubuntu 22.04 inside Docker on EKS
To roll a production secret: edit it in Vault, then trigger the kube-rolling-restart workflow in GitHub Actions
To run the test suite locally: pip install -e .[test] then pytest tests/ -v
Current API schema version is v3; v2 is deprecated and will be removed in Q4
Sentry release tracking is currently pointed at the staging environment only
